entry.title: Re: About the A/R Reserve Invoice
entry.content:
Hi,

A/R Invoice is not available in India Localization. Some features are specific to certain localization and therefore, in India Localization A/R Invoice is not applicable.

Thread for your reference:

https://community.sap.com/t5/enterprise-resource-planning-q-a/ar-reserve-invoice-for-india-localization/qaq-p/9964873

Kr,

Jitin

entry.title: SAP BI Content from SAP ECC 7 and transfer it to SAP Datasphere
entry.content:
How can we effectively use SAP BI Content from SAP ECC 7 and transfer it to SAP Datasphere ?"

Is this technically possible to leverage SAP BI Content for SAP ECC ? 

For extracting data from SAP Ecc to datasphere can we use SLT or ODP or BODS ?

pls suggest & let me know your opinion on the same

entry.title: Re: How to run SQL Queries Directly on SAP Database
entry.content: If anyone does an update to any SAP standard table using the DBA Cockpit and especially one which has security implications as USR02 does, then expect to be hauled over the coals for a flagrant security breach. In some orgs that's gross misconduct.

entry.title: Re: Shift Planning in SAP Digital Manufacturing powered by SAP SuccessFactors
entry.content:
Hi Frans,

"This includes information such as the skills and qualifications of labor resources, availability, work shifts, and any constraints or preferences." 

  • Are you saying SF skills/competencies can already be integrated with DMC's employee skills via MDI? Is this using the sap.odm.workforce.capability.WorkforceCapability?
  • Is time off integrated in two ways?
  • DMC's time tracking solution is not integrated with EC Time Tracking a.t.m., correct?

Best regards,
Pieter

entry.title: Re: Welcome all SAP Community members, start here!
entry.content:
Hello @PravallikaM - thanks for being a part of SAP Community!

I'm part of the community team and have some topical recommendations for you:

  • Discover the SAP Community - How-To Video Series
  • Contest: My Most Geeky Hobby - open to all community members - why not go over and enter or vote for your favourite?
  • Devtoberfest - coding and collaboration for all developers

entry.title: Re: UPload MSG extension file and convert to PDF file
entry.content: The conversion tool allows you to convert MSG files to PDF files using the latest techniques. Because of its sophisticated security measures, I suggest using the DailySoft MSG to PDF Exporter Tool. You can convert your MSG files to PDF format with a few mouse clicks. The converted file is currently sleeping, ensuring no data loss occurs. Even for those who are not familiar with technology, its user interface provides ease of use. You can quickly complete the conversion procedure with the latest versions of Windows, including Windows 11, 10, 8.1, 8, 7, Vista, and others. To try out the application's primary features, download the demo version right now.

Thanks for your support😃!!!

entry.title: Current cash amount in drawer
entry.content: How can I fetch the value of current cash amount in drawer B1 POS so I can use it in my plugin?

entry.title: Re: Stop campaigns
entry.content:
Hello Nancy,

You can use the API as described in our online documentation Structure of API_MKT_CAMPAIGN_SRV | SAP Help Portal.

There is no possibility to do that using campaign automation.

Best Regards, Isabelle

entry.title: Re: ICM_HTTP_CONNECTION_BROKEN
entry.content: Thanks for your explanation

entry.title: Re: Powerdesigner searching for an entity by GUID in VBA
entry.content: EntitySymbol doesn`t have TargetObject property. EntitySymbol has Object property, which will lead you to the object itself, which could be either "full" Entity or Shortcut of Entity. And if it is Shortcut of Entity, you can use its TargetObject property to get to the full Entity.

entry.title: Re: TCS calculating as per singular invoice value rather than Cummulative invoices
entry.content: Hello, thank you for your question. I suppose you have followed all steps described in "Chttps://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/634261119fec4d58970471f2c4a9a740/6515771a10b9479abe72cfe379148c9e.html?locale=en-US)? Your question has been forwarded to the experts. Kind regards, Henrikeonfiguration for Tax Collected at Source" (

entry.title: Re: Questions about third-party Warehouse Management and...
entry.content:
Hi,

could you please provide some more details what you exactly mean with “get inventory availability into a 3PL storage location”? Assumption: You would like to see the stock situation in the connected Third-Party WMS / 3PL on storage location level in your S/4HANA Public Cloud system. Without sending a Warehouse Stock Transfer Shipping Advice and receiving back a Warehouse Stock Transfer Receipt Advice it won’t be possible to post goods receipt in the warehouse and to increase the stock.

Best regards,

Darius Nowak

SAP SE, Cloud ERP Product Management Logistics

entry.title: Possibility to connect multiple maintenance orders to a service order
entry.content:
Hi All,

In SAP S/4Hana Service I am trying to test a scenario of creating multiple maintenance orders (either copy, follow-up or a sub order) against a service product in a service order wherein I want to see the parent service order linkage to all those multiple maintenance orders created. 

Please help me understand where we could see that reference of parent service order. I have checked in the document flow and also in AFIH table, did not get it.

 

Thanks a lot!

entry.title: How can I find a freight Order that has multiple Sales Orders attached to it?
entry.content: I would like to find a Freight Order that has multiple underlying Sales Orders. How can I do so? Thanks in advance!

entry.title: Call Unbound Action of a CAP remote Service from Action of a CAP Service
entry.content:
Hello,

I am trying to call an unbound action of a CAP Service from another CAP Service. When calling the action of the remote i am getting the below error. 

Steps performed

Create and deploy a CAP Service with an unbound action accepting 2 parameters.

Import the EDMX of the service into new CAP Application.

Add a New Bound Action in the new CAP Project, Call Action of the remote service as per the below documentation

https://cap.cloud.sap/docs/guides/providing-services#calling-actions-functions

Error :

this.__proto__.toJSON is not a function","stacktrace":["TypeError: this.__proto__.toJSON is not a function","at e.toJSON (/home/vcap/app/node_modules/@sap/cds/libx/_runtime/remote/utils/client.js:209:32)","at JSON.stringify (<anonymous>)","at Object.format (/home/vcap/app/node_modules/@sap/cds/lib/log/format/json.js:105:18)","at fmt (/home/vcap/app/node_modules/@sap/cds/lib/log/cds-log.js:93:38)","at logger.warn (/home/vcap/app/node_modules/@sap/cds/lib/log/cds-log.js:100:68)","at run (/home/vcap/app/node_modules/@sap/cds/libx/_runtime/remote/utils/client.js:233:22)","at process.processTicksAndRejections (node:internal/process/task_queues:95:5)","at async RemoteService.on_handler (/home/vcap/app/node_modules/@sap/cds/libx/_runtime/remote/Service.js:265:20)","at async next (/home/vcap/app/node_modules/@sap/cds/lib/srv/srv-dispatch.js:68:17)","at async RemoteService.handle

entry.title: Re: Can Overview Page use OData v4 to configure analysis...
entry.content:
Adding the following content to annotation.xml also has no effect

 

 

<Annotation Term="Aggregation.ApplySupported">
    <Record>
        <PropertyValue Property="GroupableProperties">
            <Collection>
                <PropertyPath>geoName</PropertyPath>
            </Collection>
        </PropertyValue>
    </Record>
</Annotation>

entry.title: Netting/Balance error in S_ALR_87012357

Could someone help me to overcome this issue please ?

entry.title: Re: Integration | Parallel Operation | S4 | SAP Digital M...
entry.content:
Hi,
Supporting Parallel Operations is a roadmap item.
In 2408, the very 1st step was introduced, see "Parallel Sequences in the Routing (Routing) API" in What´s New viewer. More support will come in the upcoming releases, stay tuned.

Manoel

entry.title: Re: XSUAA Based Authentication - Using Managed Approuter
entry.content:
what about the auth instance and binding it to the app?
without it will xsuaa work?

entry.title: Find different version of objects overwritten by one big transport request
entry.content:
Hey,

I am trying to find all the objects contained in a transport request that have different versions between two systems.

Background: We imported a transport request with nearly 10 000 objects, and some of them were older versions than we had on the target system. Now we dont know which objects exacly are impacted, and we are trying to go trough the whole list of the transport request and compare between the two systems. Basically if the version is newer on dev system than it is the current active version on test system, we would like to get a list of such objects.

Is there a known way of doing this ? Or would we have to develop some sort of report, and if so, does anyone have any good tips to begin with ?

Thank you in advance

entry.title: Re: Unable to follow in SAP community and get Hello World Badge
entry.content:
Thank you @jerryjanda ! Much appreciated!

Best Regards,

Sayani

entry.title: Re: "Manage Workforce" app and "Scheduler Configutation" App
entry.content:
Hi,

Manage Workforce is supposed to work with SAP SuccessFactors only.
See Integration with SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central and Schedule Replication of Workforce Data for more details.

Br,
Manoel

entry.content:
Hi,

You can automate using DRF Filters, see Define Filter Criteria.
Br,
Manoel

entry.title: Re: SAC Import Model | Data Filter during Data Import
entry.content: Hi, I got confirmation from the responsible developer that this is a bug. But there is a workaround: Use instead filter on GLAccountFlowType and IsBalanceSheetAccount.

entry.title: Re: Stay up-to-date with our content roadmap
entry.content: Today, we finalized the onboarding of the SAP Cloud Transport Management documentation. Looking forward to your feedback here. 🙂

entry.title: Re: SAP Datasphere Graphical View experience
entry.content: Achso... This is something I did not experience - only the issue with background delayed deployment. For me it was enough just to redeploy again - but I had to learn thought pain :). Are your consultants working via Remote Desktop maybe? Not directly connecting to DSP? Definitely having to change the view with the WHERE 1=1 is something I never had to do

entry.title: Re: Hierarchical planned shipping HU in EWM
entry.content:
Yes the standard algorithm SAP1 will only plan for single level.
But SAP has also the SAP2 and for what i understood is to use the UPB at EWM.
Found this note but still don´t know if it´s the solution:
3329303 - UPB with Package Builder (EWM) : Package Level Aggregation Parameter - Handling Unit structure is missing quantities

entry.title: Automatic Rounding Difference Posting to GL Account in FB60 via Posting through VIM
entry.content:
Hi Team,

We are currently posting vendor invoices to the SAP system via VIM, which is designed to eliminate the need for manual intervention. However, we’ve encountered an issue with the tax calculation. The transaction code being used is FB60, and there is a small discrepancy between the tax amount calculated by the system and the tax amount stated on the invoice.

I would like to route this difference to a specific GL account so that the posting can occur automatically. However, I have been unable to find the appropriate configuration to set this up.

entry.title: Re: CSRF token retrieval fails when making calls from the...
entry.content: Hello Junwu, I am able to fetch the CSRF token via this code. Thank you for your help

entry.title: Re: SAP BI Content from SAP ECC 7 and transfer it to SAP...
entry.content:
- If the content is not available in BW-Bridge, I see the only other way with BW/4. Implement the content in BW/4 and then use the BW/4 Model Transfer to move it to DSP. 

- ODP is out-of-the-box in DSP.  You have to use CDS Views from ECC. 

- SLT maybe as side-by-side directly to HANA Schema, but why if you can use ODP

I copied an app and tried to build the Web  App MTAR. But it fails everytime. I don't have this problem with the original app. 
I didn't find any similar cases. Is this a common problem? 


Thanks in advance

entry.title: Re: copying same serial numbers maintained at sales order...
entry.content: Hi，From a product perspective, users can also try to implement custom requirements for serial number creation through extensibility. See link for reference:https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/32da8359c8ee4e8b8e8c5e15cacba5aa/20f4d8b2420544f7a5e41471c5bf5dac.html?locale=en-US 。 For more information check the BAdI-specific documentation in the Custom Logic app: "Custom Logic "- Custom Logic - Internal Serial Number Assignment using Custom Business Objects - BAdI Documentation - View BAdI Documentation.

Is there any config needed in the SAP Build WorkZone?

Thank you.

entry.title: Re: Find different version of objects overwritten by one big transport request
entry.content: Did you restore the system before the import or not? Are the versions of the objects still present after the import?

entry.title: Compatibility check impossible. Communication error with the proxy. we are getting this error in SAP
Re: Override back button on FLP
entry.content: Hello Violina, Thanks for reaching out to us, I believe that sap.ushell.Container is designed to implement dirty state flags specifically for this purpose. You can either attach a dirtyStateProvider https://sapui5.hana.ondemand.com/sdk/#/api/sap.ushell.Container%23methods/registerDirtyStateProvider (asynchronous) or directly set the dirtyState flag to true ( https://sapui5.hana.ondemand.com/sdk/#/api/sap.ushell.Container%23methods/setDirtyFlag) whenever the user modifies or enters data. I hope this information is helpful. Please Let us know if you have further clarification

entry.title: Re: Override back button on FLP
entry.content: Hello Violina, Thanks for reaching out to us, I believe that sap.ushell.Container is designed to implement dirty state flags specifically for this purpose. You can either attach a dirtyStateProvider https://sapui5.hana.ondemand.com/sdk/#/api/sap.ushell.Container%23methods/registerDirtyStateProvider (asynchronous) or directly set the dirtyState flag to true ( https://sapui5.hana.ondemand.com/sdk/#/api/sap.ushell.Container%23methods/setDirtyFlag) whenever the user modifies or enters data. I hope this information is helpful. Please Let us know if you have further clarification

entry.title: Re: Facing problem in multi - level variant configuration
entry.content: Dear Experts, Waiting for the reply

entry.title: Re: How to return deep json object in odata api
entry.content:
Thank u but I use v2,

The object i want to get in get api  is like this

Data : { date: '13.08.2024',

        Booleanfields :true,

       Table1:[ { itemType :1,

                       Table2 :[{ name:'TTT', 

                                       Cost:34 }....], //end of table 2

                       Table3:[ { name:'ee',

                                     Table4:[ { age:4,

                                                           Booleanfield : false }....] // end of table4

                                     }...] // end of table 3

                   }...] // end of table1

      } // end of data

I not shure if it possiable to use get expanded entity hear and if to be honest i dont realy want because i need to do few get apis that return diffrent but similar data like above ( implementing $expended entity is not easy )

There is simple way to do that in v2? Is it possible in rest api?

entry.title: Re: Easy way to disable creation, modification & deletion of sales order item text ids in VA02
entry.content: This help me a lot, but my necessity is block one of the header text's. What i have to change in the code to block one of the 'text's' in the header sales order? thank you

entry.title: Re: Costs for SAP Enable Now
entry.content:
Go to store.sap.com, search for "SAP Enable Now", and then click the Buy Now button. That will show you the 'base price' - mine shows US$204. That price will be per user per year. Click the Buy Now button below this price, and on the 'Configure SAP Enable Now' screen you can enter different numbers of licenses and see the total costs. With a bit of trial and error (say, 1,000, 10,000, 50,000) you can work out where the price breaks are. Note that the minimum purchase is 50.

This is for cloud. For on prem it is different. And although a client may be able to negotiate a price, you're unlikely to get anything for free. What you do get for free is the use of SAP Companion (component of SAP Enable Now) to show SAP standard content (only) but no editing or creation capabilities at all.

entry.title: How to create a custom mapping IFlow?
entry.content: Trying to create a custom mapping IFlow, but no mapping files exist. What steps do I need to take to allow mapping files to be visible.

entry.title: Re: In the Recent Version(2402), SAP S/4 Hana Cloud, Is there provision for Configuring Funds Manage
entry.content: The term funds management is not used in S/4 HANA Cloud anymore. We have Public Sector Management which consists of Budget Management, Grants Management and Fund Accounting. It is available in 2402 for US, CA, DE and 2408 AU, NL, UK. We are hoping to add more countries in the future.

entry.title: Re: How to transfer multiple material stk from batch to b...
entry.content: Could you please tell physical inventory process

entry.title: Flexible Programming model - Issue in Transition between different charts
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I am using sapui5 flexible programming model to display a chart block in a custom page. The chart displays properly.

When i do transition between charts it is not working. By default it displays column chart but when i select different chart like bar chart or donut chart, it displays bar or donut. Now if i again select default column chart it does not displays.

View.xml:

<mvc:View controllerName="dashboard.ext.main.Main"
xmlns:core="sap.ui.core"
xmlns:mvc="sap.ui.core.mvc"
xmlns="sap.m"
xmlns:macros="sap.fe.macros"
xmlns:l="sap.ui.layout">
<Page id="Main" title="{i18n>MainTitle}">
<content>
<HBox fitContainer="true" alignItems="Stretch" alignContent="Stretch" justifyContent="Start" renderType="Div">
<l:Grid hSpacing="1" containerQuery="true" defaultSpan="L6 M6 S12">
<l:content>
<macros:Chart id="Chart" metaPath="@com.sap.vocabularies.UI.v1.Chart#PlantVsIntiatives" personalization="Type,Item,Sort" selectionMode="Multiple" chartType="Column"/>
<!-- <macros:Chart id="Chart2" metaPath="@com.sap.vocabularies.UI.v1.Chart#PlantVsIntiatives" personalization="Type,Item,Sort" selectionMode="Multiple" chartType="Column"/> -->
</l:content>
</l:Grid>
</HBox>
</content>
</Page>
</mvc:View>

annotation.cds:

using STODashboardService as service from '../../srv/dashboardservices';


annotate service.ZIJS_CDS_TOTAL_TI_COUNT with @(
Aggregation: {ApplySupported: {
$Type : 'Aggregation.ApplySupportedType',
Transformations : [
'aggregate',
'groupby'
],
Rollup : #None,
GroupableProperties : [PLANT],
AggregatableProperties: [{
$Type : 'Aggregation.AggregatablePropertyType',
Property: INITIATIVES,
}, ]

}, },
Analytics : {
// AggregatedProperty #min: {
// Name : 'Initiatives',
// AggregationMethod : 'min',
// AggregatableProperty: 'INITIATIVES',
// ![@Common.Label] : 'Initiatives'
// },
AggregatedProperty #max: {
Name : 'Initiatives',
AggregationMethod : 'max',
AggregatableProperty: 'INITIATIVES',
![@Common.Label] : 'Initiatives'
},
// AggregatedProperty #sum: {
// Name : 'Initiatives',
// AggregationMethod : 'sum',
// AggregatableProperty: 'INITIATIVES',
// ![@Common.Label] : 'Initiatives'
// },
},
UI.Chart #PlantVsIntiatives : {
$Type : 'UI.ChartDefinitionType',
Description : 'chart description',
Title : 'Events Per Departments',
ChartType : #Column,
Dimensions : [
PLANT,
],
DimensionAttributes : [
{
$Type : 'UI.ChartDimensionAttributeType',
Dimension : PLANT,
Role : #Category,
},
],
DynamicMeasures : [
'@Analytics.AggregatedProperty#max',
],
MeasureAttributes : [
{
$Type : 'UI.ChartMeasureAttributeType',
DynamicMeasure : '@Analytics.AggregatedProperty#max',
Role : #Axis1,
},
],
},

);
 
 
I am missing anything in above annotation file. Please need your help
 
Thanks,
Gowtham

entry.title: TO priority (LTAK-TAPRI) - where are the config. settings for this? can you help me please. thanks

Best Regards

Anna-Maria

entry.title: How to use OpenAPI for AuditManagement in VSCode and how to get XSUAA oAuth Token for API Call
entry.content:
Hello

i generated an OpenAPI Client in VS Code with node.js and Typescript.

https://api.sap.com/api/CFAuditLogRetrievalAPI/overview

However the code snippet does not work and gives the error show below.

I searched for some samples how to call/use and how to authenticate against this OpenAPI for AuditManagement.

I tried to understand the destination concept but get stuck. Furthermore i don't find any samples how to get the oAuth Bearer Token from XSUAA before calling the API.

Any help is appreciated or any hint to proceed. 

Kind regards,

Sebastian

entry.title: Enabling Telemetry causes crash
entry.content:
Dear Colleagues,

We have a CAP/Node.js application and we have followed the guideline to enable telemetry on the following documentation: https://github.com/cap-js/telemetry#readme 

But when we did that, we observed that there was unusual continuous increasing of memory usage after every restart of the application instances since deployment. which at the end caused a crash on the landscape.

we have gathered all the information and findings in the following https://jira.tools.sap/browse/PXINTEGRATION-1972 

Now we have rolled back the telemetry on our landscape so we avoid any crashes.

It seems for me that the telemetry should be only enabled when it is needed and it is not something would help on a daily operations, right ?

Best Regards,
Mo

entry.title: Re: A standard function module is overwriting my logic in GGB1.
entry.content: @raymond_giuseppi BSEG-FDTAG

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)
entry.content:
Hello @David_Chaviano 

I am Shriya, a young lady from India aged 27, who is working in the supply chain domain for the past 2 years. I use SAP day in and day out, and I love working with SAP since it improves businesses and helps manage large amounts of data with ease. I apply for this initiative under the category of women.

I profoundly appreciate this initiative, since it is a great opportunity to learn and get certified for free. With an increasing push to businesses in India, kind initiatives such as these would attract the women workforce into businesses in great numbers, especially the women with limited opportunities to jobs or career growth!

I look forward to getting certified under this initiative as it will help me upskill myself and be in-sync with the latest advancements in the software and in business at large. This will help me stay career-ready for the present and the future, by getting certified in the newly emerging SAP Applications.

Best regards,

Shriya

entry.title: How to tune SUM for EHP Upgrades with larger database ?
entry.content:
Dear Guru's,
 
We had recently perform EHP8 Upgrade from EHP5 where DB size is 900 GB.

Our next systems QAS and PRD have size around -- 30 TB.

whether DB size will make an impact on shadow system build and Downtime ?

Kindly suggest.

Thanks and Regards,

Mithran

entry.title: Re: Why is there no vanilla SAP Business One instance to...
entry.content:
Hi,

A couple of thoughts, that I hope may help you in your struggle.

  • B1 is not a collection of modules like for example R/4 or SAP By Design, instead it is a single software that is meant to run ALL aspects of a small-medium business. We often talk about modules, because of the way the GUI looks, and because you can block certain users from using certain parts of it. B1's main thing is that it takes care of ALL accounting related to those aspects (except payroll, because it is nearly impossible to create a software that can handle all the world's different legal systems pertaining thereto). You cannot really run B1 without the financial "module". This is also the largest factor in the system's initial configuration.
  • B1 is as vanilla as ERPs come. If you have evaluated it, you have likely looked at a demo company. Theoretically you could just continue using that demo company. Add your own master data, and you are good to go. However, you will very quickly find that the system (like any other ERP) does not do exactly what you want it to do, and you will have to reconfigure it each time. You may also find that having used the system in a certain way, will prevent you from using it in another way Having that boring meeting with the consultant in the beginning will simply save you the trouble later on. Even with a sign-up and go process that modern SAAS platforms offer, you will still have to do a lot of configuration. If you feel you do not, then that platform has comparatively very little functionality, or it costs more. So I would ask you what did you like about B1 that tmade you consider it over a SAAS solution?
  • "Badabing badaboom, done!" was said by no business manager ever, about any IT project, let alone an ERP one. 90% have never said so, and the other 10% lie about it. The main reason being, that setting up an ERP system to do what you want is an evolution that lasts as long as the business itself. Previous IT project implementations in mirror are more difficult than they appear.
  • Remember the Cheap-Fast-Good triangle.
  • If B1 looks like the software for you, you may want to consider using and implementing, it the way it is supposed to, and integrate it with any other software you may be using. Or better yet, do everything with B1, and save the costs of the other software packages.

Regards,

Johan

entry.title: Re: How do I determine the user-exit for FB01 when saving?
entry.content: How do I create an exit for that?

entry.title: Re: How to convert TLINE to XSTRING
entry.content: Can you help me, what exactly helped you as I am also having similar requirement.

entry.title: TM link between /scmtms/d_torrot and /scmtms/d_trqstg
entry.content:
Hi,

I'm writing a CDS view to get various stages of the freight unit in the transportation management module. I'm specifically looking at the linkages between /scmtms/d_trqrot, /scmtms/d_torstp and /scmtms/d_trqstg.

I've analyzed the TCode BOBF for /scmtms/trq and stage, but unable to get he link.

Thank you so much for your support.

William

entry.title: SAP Cloud Identity Services ideal architecture to support multi tier SAP landscape
entry.content:
I've been working on a BTP solution architecture in a traditional multi-tier [dev/test/uat/prod] SAP [ECC, S4] backend system landscape using SAP Cloud Identity Services [IAS + IPS] for both provisioning and authentication.

With the current known facts like 

- CIS Service plan [1 productive, 1 test tenant] per customer account [excluding trail tenant for now].

- While test and productive CIS tenants differ only by name and nothing else technically, use test tenant to test your changes before productionising it.

seeking expert community advice to understand different views on how to use Test and Productive tenant efficiently to support 

- Seamless SSO using IAS as the authenticator for all different SAP environments in the landscape [dev/test/uat/prod] linked to same corporate IDP.

- Seamless provisioning via IPS using different environments [dev/test/uat/prod] as sources to the same target [IAS].

- test new authentication / provisioning features without impacting other existing applications.

It would be nice to have report with saved data for testing.

3333218 - HTML export of Crystal Reports with logo using .NET SDK results in a cropped and blurred logo

entry.title: Re: Task 1 - Create CDS View Entity ( August Developer Challenge )
entry.content: Please find below screenshot.

entry.title: Requirement related to PO release strategy
entry.content:
Hello Everyone,

My client has one requirement- They want to hit the release strategy in PO for Net Overall Value along with the Item value too.

Just for example- 

  1. Buyer is procuring a 10 Laptops of dell= each 10K so total= 1L, now release strategy hits till 2 level
  2. But now buyer is procuring a single laptop of Apple= each 1L so total= 1L only, So here can we hit same release strategy till level 3?

    So is this possible to achieve?

    Regards,

    Siddhesh Ghag.

entry.title: Re: How to read Security audit Logs (SM19/SM20) using FM RSAU_READ_LOG?
entry.content: Just wondering if you managed to resolve this. We are facing the same issue with this FM.

entry.title: Unauthorised error while connecting to Built Process automation from CPI via HTTP Receiver Adapter
entry.content:
Hi All 

We are trying to send ODATA API details to Build Process Automation using an HTTP receiver Adapter.

 

We are using OAUTH2 Client Credentials from BPA in CPI.

But while deploying the iflow ,CPI gives unauthorized error.

 

Please let me know if we are missing here any steps.

Thanks

Priya

entry.title: Re: In the Recent Version(2402), SAP S/4 Hana Cloud, Is t...
entry.content:
Hello,

Thank you for your question.

Here's the expert's answer copied from the Replies section:

The term funds management is not used in S/4 HANA Cloud anymore. We have Public Sector Management which consists of Budget Management, Grants Management and Fund Accounting. It is available in 2402 for US, CA, DE and 2408 AU, NL, UK. We are hoping to add more countries in the future.

Kind regards,

Henrike

entry.title: Re: How to return deep json object in odata api
entry.content:
There is no way to do that in OData V2, other than what you have already discovered: tunnel your deep structure in a JSON string.

OData V2 does not support collection-valued properties, which is one of the many reasons why we moved forward to OData V4 ten years ago.

Maybe you want to switch to V4.

entry.title: Re: about Upload CSV File for Reassign Costs and Revenues
entry.content: forwarded to the experts

entry.title: Re: Step by step guide to create a Planning Model in Sap Analytics Cloud using Excel file
entry.content: look like he is not interested share the sample data files which he used in this blog. Many people are looking for that.

entry.title: Re: Profit Segment not available on import supplier invoice
entry.content:
Hello Kumiko,

I understand your concern!

However since there was not much vote for the influence request it was closed and not planned.
I would request you to raise an incident with SAP for this, so that your concern can be passed on to the Development team. And based on their recommendations you can again raise an influence request, if that is needed.

Current possible workaround

As we know that for now only option of profit center is available at item in the template and nothing related to profitability segment.

Hence my suggestion would be that until the functionality is not present, please make use of the APIs available in SAP API Hub, refer to below one as one of the reference.
https://api.sap.com/api/API_SUPPLIERINVOICE_PROCESS_SRV/overview 

Additionally,

Possibility to extend the template with custom fields has always been there.
If required/needed refer below for that.
https://me.sap.com/notes/0003413137 

Best Regards,
Vijayendra

entry.title: RISE with SAP: Collaborating for better Security and Compliance
entry.content:
Join us to learn about the security processes, innovative solutions and services that are provided by RISE with SAP to help protect business data and operations, support regulatory requirements, and strengthen enterprise resilience.
Discover how RISE with SAP fosters vital collaborations to enhance security and compliance.

entry.title: New Contest Open in SAP Community
entry.content:
We have a new contest which is open to all SAP Community members - My Most Geeky Hobby - share your photo and you could be in with a chance to win a voucher for SAP merchandise!

Read more about our contest series overall.

Feel free to leave a comment if you have an idea for a future contest as well!!

entry.title: Automatic clearing of payments in payment run
entry.content:
The system is automatically clearing payments made in the payment run against invoices soon as the payment run is done. This therefore leaves payments in status "In preparation" and not "Ready to transfer". Please assist with disabling the automatic allocation/clearing of the payments.

#PaymentRun #Automatic #Clearing

entry.title: Apps like MIGO no longer hyperlink to FB04
entry.content:
What is this change?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Different sort order
entry.content:
Here's what I got from Support Rep:

As per the following SAP Knowledge Base you created in 2013, Crystal Reports is developed using Microsoft's C++ compiler, and database sort can differ depending on their collation.

In Crystal Reports sorting is based on the Alphabet and not on the ASCII values. This is why they are seeing a difference in the sort.

     1843282 - Case sensitive sort issue - ASCII compared to Alphabetical values

entry.title: Re: Apps like MIGO no longer hyperlink to FB04
entry.content: Please see the following KBA documenting this change - https://me.sap.com/notes/3494133

entry.title: Re: ASR Integration With SAP EWM - Outbound Delivery
entry.content: Good One

entry.title: Re: How to convert TLINE to XSTRING
entry.content: @MadhavSharma  Please open a new question. This thread is from *2008*.

entry.title: Re: Need Explanation of Error For EDI Extended Validation(CallActivity_70)
entry.content: I found the issue that was causing the problem. I was using the wrong Source RD.xsd file for my IFlow. Should have been using the Source RD.XSD file that is generated when you export your MAG. If you export the MIG and use the Source RD.XSD file created, this will cause the error due to how the file is created.

entry.title: Strengthening Protection: Product Security Response at SAP
entry.content:
Cybersecurity month at SAP:
Join us for an insightful exploration of SAP’s Product Security Vulnerability Management, an essential pillar in defending against cyber threats. We'll present on our strategies for identifying and prioritizing vulnerabilities that are reported to us, collaborating across teams, and maintaining the security of our products in an ever-evolving threat landscape and delivering secure products to our customers. This session is Ideal for security professionals and leaders, to get a high-level overview on product security posture at SAP.

entry.title: Re: New End User File Upload in SAP Analytics Cloud QRC3 2024
entry.content:
Hi @gerd_schoeffl ,

this new functionality is very important for all planning processes.

Equally important would be to have the same functionality for updating public dimensions. Users normally need to update the master data first and then the fact data.

Is this functionality scheduled to be released?

Thank you

Best regards

Marco
